name: Audio Visualization
description: Audio-reactive waveform and spectrum visualization with beat detection, frequency analysis, and multiple display styles.

WaveformDisplay.code: function WaveformDisplay(props) { var w = props.layerSize.width; var h = props.layerSize.height; var numBars = 64; var barWidth = 4; var barGap = 2; var totalW = barWidth + barGap; var startX = (w - numBars * totalW + barGap) / 2; var centerY = h / 2; var color = props.color || '#00ff88'; var bars = []; for (var i = 0; i < numBars; i++) { var val = Math.sin(props.frame * 0.15 + i * 0.4) * 0.4 + Math.sin(props.frame * 0.08 + i * 0.7) * 0.3 + Math.sin(props.frame * 0.22 + i * 0.15) * 0.2; var amp = Math.abs(val); var barH = Math.max(3, amp * h * 0.85); var topH = barH; var botH = barH; bars.push(React.createElement('rect', { key: 't' + i, x: startX + i * totalW, y: centerY - topH, width: barWidth, height: topH, rx: 2, ry: 2, fill: color })); bars.push(React.createElement('rect', { key: 'b' + i, x: startX + i * totalW, y: centerY, width: barWidth, height: botH, rx: 2, ry: 2, fill: color, opacity: 0.5 })); } return React.createElement('svg', { width: w, height: h, viewBox: '0 0 ' + w + ' ' + h }, bars); }

SpectrumDisplay.code: function SpectrumDisplay(props) { var w = props.layerSize.width; var h = props.layerSize.height; var numBars = 48; var barGap = 3; var barW = Math.max(1, (w - barGap * (numBars - 1)) / numBars); var color1 = props.color1 || '#ff0066'; var color2 = props.color2 || '#00ccff'; var bars = []; function hexToRgb(hex) { var r = parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16); var g = parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16); var b = parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16); return [r,g,b]; } var c1 = hexToRgb(color1); var c2 = hexToRgb(color2); for (var i = 0; i < numBars; i++) { var t = i / (numBars - 1); var freq = (Math.sin(props.frame * 0.12 + i * 0.25) * 0.5 + 0.5) * (0.3 + 0.7 * Math.pow(Math.sin(props.frame * 0.06 + i * 0.1), 2)); var barH = Math.max(3, freq * h * 0.92); var x = i * (barW + barGap); var y = h - barH; var r = Math.round(c1[0] + (c2[0]-c1[0])*t); var g = Math.round(c1[1] + (c2[1]-c1[1])*t); var b = Math.round(c1[2] + (c2[2]-c1[2])*t); var col = 'rgb(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ')'; bars.push(React.createElement('rect', { key: i, x: x, y: y, width: barW, height: barH, rx: 3, ry: 3, fill: col })); } return React.createElement('svg', { width: w, height: h, viewBox: '0 0 ' + w + ' ' + h }, bars); }
SpectrumDisplay.description: Frequency spectrum bars with gradient color

props.text: Beat Detection • Frequency Analysis • Waveform Display
